help.idle: Hover any button to see what it does. Triple-tap INTERACT to hide / show this panel.
help.prev: PREV: audition the previous sound in the full flat list (plays it). Walks across categories.
help.play: PLAY: replay the currently selected sound at the booth.
help.next: NEXT: audition the next sound in the full list (plays it). Tap to scan through everything.
help.qToggle: QUEUE: add or remove the current sound from the record queue. Queue count shows in the status bar.
help.catPrev: CATEGORY back: jump to the previous category (does NOT play). Selects that category's first sound.
help.catNext: CATEGORY forward: jump to the next category (does NOT play). Selects that category's first sound.
help.qCat: ADD CATEGORY: put every sound in the current category into the record queue.
help.qClear: CLEAR QUEUE: empty the record queue.
help.jM10: JUMP -10: move the selection cursor back 10 WITHOUT playing. Use to set a start track or resume past a crash.
help.jM1: JUMP -1: move the selection cursor back 1 without playing.
help.jP1: JUMP +1: move the selection cursor forward 1 without playing.
help.jP10: JUMP +10: move the selection cursor forward 10 without playing.
help.recCat: REC CATEGORY: record the WHOLE current category in one take. Start OBS first; each sound logs its game-time for the splitter.
help.recFrom: REC FROM HERE: record from the current track to the END of its category. Use this to resume recording after a crash.
help.recQueue: REC QUEUE: record only the sounds you queued, in order. Great for grabbing a hand-picked set.
help.recAll: REC ALL: record every sound in the game (very long). Use a large OBS file.
help.recVO: REC VO GROUP: record the currently-selected VO group (cycle with VO GROUP buttons). Objective/MCom are the proven-working ones; broadcast lines are mostly context-only and may be silent.
help.recStop: STOP REC: stop the current recording and return to the booth with the panel open.
help.voGrp: VO GROUP: cycle which announcer subset REC VO GROUP records - All / Objective / MCom / CheckPoint / Sector / Broadcast. Pick Objective or MCom to skip the silent broadcast lines.
help.radio: RADIO: play the next in-vehicle radio track on the current channel.
help.radioCh: RADIO CH: switch to the next radio channel (resets to track 0).
help.musEvt: MUSIC EVENT: play the next scripted music event (stingers / loops).
help.stopAll: STOP EVERYTHING: immediately stop ALL sounds, music, and any recording, then return to the booth.
help.close: HIDE PANEL: hide this panel to view the game. The status bar + log stay on screen; triple-tap INTERACT reopens it.
